titleStmt.title: SII 41.20: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 20. (A.R. No. 19 of 1905.) Kīḻūr, Tirukkoyilur Taluk, South Arcot District.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Vīraṭṭāṉēśvara temple.

The king may be identified with Kulōttuṅga I (1070-1120 A.D.) on grounds of palaeography. This records the gift of 7 kaḻanñju of gold by Āḍavallān and Sūtta •••valan (?), devaradiyar (temple servants) of the deity Tiruvīraṭṭānamuḍaiya-mahādēva at Tirukkōvalūr for the provision of food offerings and ornaments such as tirukkāppu, tiruttāli for the god and goddess in the temple of Tiruvīraṭṭānam-uḍaiyamahādēva on the fifth day of chittirai festival at Tirukkōvalūr, in Kuṟukkai-kūṟṟam, a district of Jananāthavaḷaāḍu, alias Milāḍu. The gift money was left in the hands of the Śivabrāhmaṇa members of the Tiruvuṇṇāḻigai sabhā of the temple, who agreed to maintain the services with kalam of paddy by the measure Tiruvīraṭṭāṉa-marakkāl.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājakecaripanmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīkulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 Āvatu milāṭāna jananāta vaḷanāṭṭuk kuṟukkaik kūṟṟattu tirukkovalūr tiruviraṭṭānamuṭaiya mahādevarkku Ittevar tevaraṭiyārkaḷ cūtta valan Āṭavallāṉāl Ittevaṟku cittirait tirunāḷil Añcā nāḷ Āṭi Eḻuntaruḷumaṟṟu tiruccāntāṭalukku Aḻivukku kācu kallāl māṭaiyoṭokkum niṟai vāka Eḻukaḻañcum ta
tevar śivabrāhmaṇarom kaḻañcu ponnukku tiruviraṭṭāna marakkālāl nellukkalamāka Eḻukalanellum Āṭṭāṇṭu toṟum Ittevar paṇṭāratte koṭuvantu Aḷappomānom Ittevar tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyom Innellu Eḻukalamum niman=tamaṭaitta paricāvatu Āṭiyaruḷa Eḻuntaruḷum nānṟu nāḷāl tirukkāppunāṇ cāttiyaruḷum ponnukkum tiruvamutarici nānāḻikku nelluk kuṟuṇi yirunāḻiyum nampirāṭṭiyār tiruttāli nel Aināḻiyum kaṟiyamutu nellu nāḻiyum neyamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutukku nel kku Arici Irunāḻiyum Aiññāḻiyum śrīparameśvararkkum kūṭavaiycca kāyum veṟṟilaiyuṅ koḷḷa nellu patakkum tiruccāntāṭalukku kku nellu patakkum n=tiruvamutarici nānāḻikku tayiramutaricik kuṟuṇikku nellu patakkum
nellukkuṟuṇi Irunāḻi kaṟiyamutu neyamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutukku nellu Irunāḻi tānattukku neykku nellu patakku ponnukku nellu patakku Arici Irunāḻi Eḷḷukku nellu nānāḻi Uṭaiyāṟukkum Uṭaiyāḷukku koṭip pari ppai cārttiyaruḷa nelluk kalam cāntukkum cantaṇattukkum nelluttūṇip patakkut tirukkoḷkaikku nellukkuṟuṇi tiruppaḷḷittāma kuṟuṇi kucavanukkukkuṟuṇi vikiṭuvāṟku nelluk kuṟuṇi � ṭaiyāṟku yāṟkun=tiruvamutu yāl nellu mukkuṟuṇi Aṟunāḻi neyamutu tayiramutu kaṟiyamutu Aṭaikkāyamutukku nellu kuṟuṇi piḷḷaiyāṟku tiruvamutu paṇṇi kku nelleḻu nāḻi tiruccāntāṭa Eḻun=taruḷi tiruvolakkañ ceytaruḷi perun=tiruvamutu ceytaruḷa Uṭaiyārkkum pirā
ṭṭikkum Arici tūṇip patakkināl nelluk kalane patakku kaṟiyamutu neyamutu tayiramutu Aṭaikkāyamutukku nellu patakku caṭṭic coṟṟukku Arici tūṇip patakkināl nelluk kalane patakku kaṟikku nellukuṟuṇi tiruvolakkañ cevitta tevaraṭiyārkku nellu vakkum Ukaccarkkum nellu mukkuṟuṇi puṇṇākattukku Arici Irunāḻiyāl nel I celuttak kaṭavom Ānom tiruvuṇṇāḻikai sabhaiyom Ivai panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 41.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
